message: 🌱 Add linkerd: Can't deploy Linkerd v2.13.x with ArgoCD mission (#372)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "linkerd-10762-can-t-deploy-linkerd-v2-13-x-with-argocd",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "linkerd: Can't deploy Linkerd v2.13.x with ArgoCD",
+    "description": "Can't deploy Linkerd v2.13.x with ArgoCD. This issue affects 26+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify linkerd troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your linkerd deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=linkerd\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for error: `output, etc`"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Pod configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant linkerd resources:\n```bash\nkubectl get pod -A\nkubectl describe pod <name> -n <namespace>\n```\n### What is the issue?\n\nA Kubernetes Lease object is part of the Linkerd helm chart. This type of object is excluded by Argo, and thus the Lease is never created. This causes the `destination` pods to"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Can't deploy Linkerd v2.13.x with ArgoCD",
+        "description": "The Linkerd control plane chart contains a Lease resource which is used by the Policy controller to do leader election.  ArgoCD considers Leases to be runtime resources and will not deploy them.  This means that Linkerd will not work for users of ArgoCD.\n\nWe remove the policy-controller-write Lease \n```yaml\nError: failed to get lease: ApiError: leases.coordination.k8s.io \"policy-controller-write\" not found: NotFound (ErrorResponse { status: \"Failure\", message: \"leases.coordination.k8s.io \\\"policy-controller-write\\\" not found\", reason: \"NotFound\", code: 404 })\r\n\r\n\r\nCaused by:\r\n 0: ApiError: leases.coordination.k8s.io \"policy-controller-write\" not found: NotFound (ErrorResponse { status: \"Failure\", message: \"leases.coordination.k8s.io \\\"policy-controller-write\\\" not found\", reason: \"NotFound\", code: 404 })\r\n 1: leases.coordination.k8s.io \"policy-controller-write\" not found: NotFound\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Can't deploy Linkerd v2.13.x with ArgoCD is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that `output, etc` no longer appears in logs."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The root cause is: The Linkerd control plane chart contains a Lease resource which is used by the Policy controller to do leader election.  ArgoCD considers Leases to be runtime resources and will not deploy them.  This means that Linkerd will not work for users of ArgoCD.\n\nWe remove the policy-controller-write Lease resource from the Helm chart and instead have the policy controller create this resource at startup.. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Error: failed to get lease: ApiError: leases.coordination.k8s.io \"policy-controller-write\" not found: NotFound (ErrorResponse { status: \"Failure\", message: \"leases.coordination.k8s.io \\\"policy-controller-write\\\" not found\", reason: \"NotFound\", code: 404 })\r\n\r\n\r\nCaused by:\r\n 0: ApiError: leases.coordination.k8s.io \"policy-controller-write\" not found: NotFound (ErrorResponse { status: \"Failure\", message: \"leases.coordination.k8s.io \\\"policy-controller-write\\\" not found\", reason: \"NotFound\", code: 404 })\r\n 1: leases.coordination.k8s.io \"policy-controller-write\" not found: NotFound",
+        "Subject\r\n\r\nProblem\r\n\r\nSolution\r\n\r\nValidation\r\n\r\nFixes #[GitHub issue ID]\r\n\r\nDCO Sign off",
+        "Introduce Pull Request Template\r\n\r\nGitHub's community guidelines recommend a pull request template, the repo was\r\nlacking one.\r\n\r\nIntroduce a `PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md` file.\r\n\r\nOnce merged, the\r\n[Community profile checklist](https://github.com/linkerd/linkerd2/community)\r\nshould indicate the repo now provides a pull request template.\r\n\r\nFixes #3321\r\n\r\nSigned-off-by: Jane Smith <jane.smith@example.com>"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
